guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 46. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_q: Point to the big Q and say: quququ. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_u: Now point to the big U and say: uuuuuu.

parent_story: The queen wrote with a quill. The queen sat on a golden chair.
